_comment: Externally verified NYMEX CL futures LTD and LO option expiry dates. Sources: ICE WTI American-style options expiry table (mirrors the NYMEX LO schedule; delivery-month labels) fetched 2026-07-10; ICE WTI futures expiry table (ICE futures LTD = NYMEX CL LTD - 1 business day, ICE uses a 4-days-prior rule); documented CLK20/LOK20 dates from the April 2020 negative-price event.

_sources.2020-05: documented CLK20 last trade 2020-04-21 / LOK20 expiry 2020-04-16
